PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Per Odeling.

Ms. Calhoun reported that her client is out of the country, that they are okay with bond but request that it be set at $10,000.00 to keep costs down and that all of the funds will be placed into a blocked account. The Court stated that it was intending to set bond at $696,000.00 and will have to review the new proposal. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Continued To Oct-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
